page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Gogetdata (ggd) is a genomic data managment system. it provide simple and reproducible access to a repository of genomic data. simply put, it is 'conda' for genomic data
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Go Get Data (GGD) is a framework that facilitates reproducible access to genomic data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Go Get Data (GGD) is a framework that facilitates reproducible access to genomic data.
